hooks.command: bash -c 'export GOROOT="$HOME/go-sdk" PATH="$HOME/go-sdk/bin:$HOME/go/bin:$PATH" && cd "$CLAUDE_WORKING_DIRECTORY" && STAGED_GO=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go" | head -1) && if [ -n "$STAGED_GO" ]; then golangci-lint run --new-from-rev=origin/main --timeout=5m 2>&1; fi'
